scenario.name: UAC REGISTER Unregister
scenario.send: REGISTER sip:[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: <sip:alice@[remote_ip]>;tag=[pid]SIPpTag00[call_number] To: <sip:alice@[remote_ip]> Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 REGISTER Contact: <sip:alice@[local_ip]:[local_port]>;expires=3600 Max-Forwards: 70 Expires: 3600 Content-Length: 0

REGISTER sip:[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: <sip:alice@[remote_ip]>;tag=[pid]SIPpTag00[call_number] To: <sip:alice@[remote_ip]> Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 2 REGISTER Contact: <sip:alice@[local_ip]:[local_port]>;expires=0 Max-Forwards: 70 Expires: 0 Content-Length: 0
